summary: Completed comprehensive testing of admin panel for Hosting hospitality website - all admin functionality working perfectly
passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@hosting.com / Hosting@2026)
Admin login validation with wrong password shows error
Dashboard stats cards display (Properties: 2, Bookings: 4, Inquiries: 3, Revenue: ₹14,000)
Properties tab shows 2 existing properties with edit/delete buttons
Add Property button opens form modal with all required fields
Add Property form validation and successful submission
New property appears in list after creation
Edit property functionality updates property details
Delete property with confirmation modal works correctly
Bookings tab shows 4 booking records in table format
Inquiries tab shows 3 contact submissions
Logout button works and returns to login screen
Admin session persistence - token removed from localStorage on logout
Back to site navigation works correctly
Backend API: POST /api/admin/properties creates property (auth required)
Backend API: PUT /api/admin/properties/{id} updates property (auth required)
Backend API: DELETE /api/admin/properties/{id} deletes property (auth required)
Backend API: GET /api/admin/bookings returns bookings (auth required)
Backend API: GET /api/admin/contacts returns contacts (auth required)
Backend API: GET /api/admin/stats returns stats (auth required)
Unauthorized access to admin endpoints returns 401
Invalid token access returns 401
Admin logout API works correctly
Landing page at / still works correctly with properties loaded

success_percentage.backend: 100% (22/22 API tests passed including 12 new admin tests)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (admin panel fully integrated with backend APIs)
